    java/openjdk8: (aarch64) builds fine with llvm from base

    ran poudriere on FreeBSD 13.3/14.0/14.1/15.0
    all failing ports mentioned in the issue are building fine now:
     benchmarks/scimark2
     devel/tijmp
     sysutils/javaservicewrapper
     www/jericho-html

    PR:     264065
